name: @sinamtz/pi-mempalace
description: hasslefree and self-contained mempalace port for pi-coding-agent with SurrealDB-backed vector search, layered retrieval, and multi-process auto-server runtime

scripts.test: bun test test/fs-error.test.ts test/logger.test.ts test/surreal-binary.test.ts test/extension.test.ts test/singleton.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: bun test test/fs-error.test.ts test/logger.test.ts test/surreal-binary.test.ts test/extension.test.ts test/singleton.test.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun test test/memory.test.ts && bun test test/miner.test.ts && bun test test/kg/kg.test.ts && bun test test/phase5.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun test test/fs-error.test.ts test/logger.test.ts test/surreal-binary.test.ts test/extension.test.ts test/singleton.test.ts && bun run test/singleton-crossprocess.ts && bun test test/memory.test.ts && bun test test/miner.test.ts && bun test test/kg/kg.test.ts && bun test test/phase5.test.ts
